info.title: tigrbl_auth admin/control-plane
info.description: Generated admin/control-plane contract derived from implementation-backed RPC registration and filtered by the effective deployment boundary.

methods.name: audit.export
methods.summary: Export durable audit events.
methods.description: Exports the filtered audit result set as JSON, NDJSON, or CSV content.

methods.name: audit.list
methods.summary: List durable audit events.
methods.description: Returns persisted audit events for operator search and review.

methods.name: claims.lint
methods.summary: Run claims lint against the governance plane.
methods.description: Executes the claims lint pipeline and returns the summarized result.

methods.name: claims.show
methods.summary: Return effective claims for the active deployment profile.
methods.description: Builds and returns the effective target-claims manifest.

methods.name: client.list
methods.summary: List OAuth/OIDC clients in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns client rows from the admin control plane.

methods.name: client.registration.delete
methods.summary: Delete a durable client-registration record.
methods.description: Deletes RFC 7592 registration state through the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: client.registration.list
methods.summary: List durable client-registration records.
methods.description: Returns RFC 7591/7592 registration state from the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: client.registration.show
methods.summary: Show a durable client-registration record.
methods.description: Returns a single registration record from the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: client.registration.upsert
methods.summary: Create or update a durable client-registration record.
methods.description: Persists registration state through the same service layer used by the CLI surface.

methods.name: client.show
methods.summary: Show a client in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns a single client record by identifier.

methods.name: consent.list
methods.summary: List durable consent records.
methods.description: Returns persisted consent grants for operator inspection.

methods.name: consent.revoke
methods.summary: Revoke a durable consent record.
methods.description: Administratively revokes a consent grant and returns the resulting persisted state.

methods.name: consent.show
methods.summary: Show a durable consent record.
methods.description: Returns a single consent grant by identifier.

methods.name: discovery.show
methods.summary: Show effective OIDC discovery metadata for the deployment.
methods.description: Returns the effective discovery document as currently configured.

methods.name: evidence.status
methods.summary: Summarize evidence-plane status.
methods.description: Returns the evidence readiness summary, failures, and warnings.

methods.name: flow.list
methods.summary: List effective protocol flow slices for the current deployment.
methods.description: Summarizes active protocol slices, routes, required flags, and mapped targets.

methods.name: gate.run
methods.summary: Run a named release gate.
methods.description: Executes a configured release gate and returns pass/fail status with details.

methods.name: identity.list
methods.summary: List identities in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns user/identity rows from the admin control plane.

methods.name: identity.show
methods.summary: Show an identity in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns a single user/identity record by identifier.

methods.name: jwks.show
methods.summary: Show the effective JWKS document.
methods.description: Returns the effective JWKS publication payload generated by the shared service layer.

methods.name: keys.list
methods.summary: List durable service keys and key-rotation history.
methods.description: Returns key rows and key-rotation audit rows from the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: keys.rotate
methods.summary: Rotate the signing key and persist a key-rotation event.
methods.description: Performs an operator key rotation through the same service layer used by the CLI surface.

methods.name: profile.show
methods.summary: Show the effective deployment/profile posture.
methods.description: Returns the effective deployment manifest together with current and certification state summaries.

methods.name: release.bundle
methods.summary: Build a release bundle.
methods.description: Builds the current release bundle and returns its path and digest.

methods.name: rpc.discover
methods.summary: Return the active implementation-backed RPC method catalog.
methods.description: Discovers the operator/admin RPC methods derived from executable registration.

methods.name: session.list
methods.summary: List durable browser and auth sessions.
methods.description: Returns session records from the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: session.show
methods.summary: Show a durable session and its latest logout state.
methods.description: Returns a single session together with its latest logout propagation state.

methods.name: session.terminate
methods.summary: Terminate a durable session and persist logout state.
methods.description: Administratively ends a session through the same service layer used by the CLI surface.

methods.name: target.list
methods.summary: List certification-scope targets.
methods.description: Returns the authoritative certification-scope target entries and their reality metadata.

methods.name: target.show
methods.summary: Show a certification-scope target.
methods.description: Returns a single certification-scope target entry by label.

methods.name: tenant.list
methods.summary: List tenants in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns tenant records from the durable admin control plane.

methods.name: tenant.show
methods.summary: Show a tenant in the admin plane.
methods.description: Returns a single tenant record by identifier.

methods.name: token.exchange
methods.summary: Create a durable token exchange record.
methods.description: Persists RFC 8693 token-exchange lineage through the shared operator service layer.

methods.name: token.inspect
methods.summary: Inspect token posture and current introspection state.
methods.description: Returns token hash, active state, revocation state, and the introspection payload.

methods.name: token.list
methods.summary: List durable token records.
methods.description: Returns token status records from the shared operator service layer.

ClaimsLintParams.title: ClaimsLintParams
ClaimsLintParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

ClaimsShowParams.title: ClaimsShowParams
ClaimsShowParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

EmptyParams.title: EmptyParams
EmptyParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

EvidenceStatusParams.title: EvidenceStatusParams
EvidenceStatusParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

JwksShowParams.title: JwksShowParams
JwksShowParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

KeysListParams.title: KeysListParams
KeysListParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

ProfileShowParams.title: ProfileShowParams
ProfileShowParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.

TargetListParams.title: TargetListParams
TargetListParams.description: Methods with no parameters use an empty request object.
